title: Rapid Technology Assessment: Future computing
body: "This report is a summary of a project completed in January 2025 (information cut-off date November 2024). This report provides an introduction to future computing paradigms, recent developments, opportunities, and challenges identified through research and discussions with a range of experts.   We would like to thank the following for their contribution and expert review:     Prof Peter G.R. Smith    Dr Gaetano di Caterina    Dr Oliver Rhodes    Dr Davide Bertozzi    Prof Themis Prodomakis     Dr James Semple    Prof Thomas Heinis    Dr Aidong Xu    Dr Simon Thomas    Dr Richard Black    Hitesh Ballani    NCSC    DSIT    FCDO   DSTL    "
